text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
There are plans to hold many more races
from here on, so be sure to participate
as much as you can!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
After completing a Career playthrough,
compete in races. Use the rewards you
gain through racing to power up your
Trainee Umamusume and Support Cards.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Be sure to remember that Career
playthroughs and racing are integral to
making your trainees stronger.
color_text_info_list: Career playthroughs and racing are integral to making your trainees stronger
